name: planrobin-milestone0
description: Milestone 0: validate the drug-tier lookup engine against one real Medicare plan using CMS PUF + RxNorm. Validation scripts only — no app.

scripts.all: node scripts/01_resolve_plan.js && node scripts/02_resolve_rxcui.js && node scripts/03_join_formulary.js && node scripts/04_price.js && node scripts/05_validate.js
scripts.test: node tests/overrides.test.js && node tests/channels.test.js && node tests/pricing.test.js && node tests/acceptance.test.js
